feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Metadata error in BTP Cockpit when trying to reach S3P system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

As I am trying to do changes in the existing UI5 application developed in the BAS from my trail account I am unable to get the data for the app from S3P system from the backend. I am facing the Metadata Error and SAP Client Error.

entry.title: Order Amendement ERP
entry.content: Need to understand if we can amend or change order type and sold-to party of a sales order in ERP after it has been created and what would be the impact of it ?

entry.title: Asset Master Data Correction
entry.content: The asset has been posted with a value, but ANLA-ZUJHR (year of acquisition) is blank, and the AS02 field is grayed out and cannot be edited.

entry.title: Cannot choose sales orders from memory dropdown in system
entry.content:
In the Sales Order List report, when users try to reopen a previously accessed sales order, they can see the sales order number by pressing the spacebar, but they are unable to select the order and execute it which was happening previously. 

As a result, users must manually search for the sales order, enter it into the field, and then execute the report, which is time-consuming for the business.

entry.title: How to handle special characters and space in the standard database table in S/4 HANA 2023 SP02
entry.content:
Special characters and unwanted spaces are being stored in text fields within the standard database table. We are encountering issues when retrieving records containing these special characters, as they are not visible at the database level. However, when the extracted data is transmitted to an external system, the presence of these hidden special characters causes the interface processing to fail. 

Does SAP have any existing tool or app or program that can help identify the special characters in the database and potential remove that special character from the database?

entry.title: ASN quantity in Cumulative received Qty in the inbound DELFOR IDOC
entry.content:
Example Scheduling agreement in P01 - 1685053482

Example -

Cumulative delivered qty - 1000

Actually received by customer (GR done) - 600

ASN received by customer, still in transit - 200

In transit                                                  - 200

Customer sends cumulative received qty as 800. This is contrary to SAP design. How do we resolve this?

entry.title: Data Cleansing of SAP Standard Tables by Removing Special Characters and Spaces in S/4HANA 2023 SP02
entry.content:
Special characters and unintended whitespace are currently being stored in text fields within standard database tables. These non-printable or hidden characters are not readily visible at the database level, making them difficult to identify during data validation and analysis.

However, when records containing these characters are extracted and transmitted to external systems, they cause interface processing failures and data integration issues. 

Do SAP provide any tools or app's or programs that can detect hidden special characters within database fields and support their removal or cleansing?

entry.title: BW Infocube Compression request taking more disk space
entry.content:
Recently, we completed the BW compression activity for the years DIGITS to DIGITS in the Q system to reduce memory disk space.
However, we have noticed that the disk space has unexpectedly increased compared to the disk usage before the compression activity.
Could you please advise if there are any temporary files, log files, or other system files that can be safely cleaned up to reduce the disk space usage?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unwanted change log is showing in business Partner
entry.content:
We are updating a custom field in business partner at company code label by using the class VMD_EI_API in program.

After successfully execution of the program required fields updated in the business partner and same is appearing in the change logs but simultaneously few unwanted change log are also displaying in the change history in business partner.

entry.title: Unwanted change log is showing in business Partner
entry.content:
We are updating a custom field in business partner at company code label by using the class VMD_EI_API in program.

After successfully execution of the program required fields updated in the business partner and same is appearing in the change logs but simultaneously few unwanted change log are also displaying in the change history in business partner.

entry.title: SO, DO , Billing Status on Document Flow
entry.content:
After performing several configurations and tests, the issue continued to fail,  SO / DO / Billing status not displayed properly  on the document flow 

For SO did configure with tcode : VTAA 

For DO did configure with tcode : VTAF

For SO did configure with tcode : VTLA

entry.title: The commitment values show negative figures in S_ALR_87013019.
entry.content: Commitment values should normally be positive, and zero if there is no consumption. Why do negative values occur?

entry.title: Too many line items in the Material document
entry.content:
Business case : While posting the goods adjustment for the items in the store from external non SAP system by Material document posting API , the error is encountered with "Too many line items in the Material document" during heavy load performance testing. We have found one old note which provides update on why this is like that 105087 - Too many items in a material document - SAP for Me 

Support Requested : 

What we want to know from the SAP experts is if there any workaround or not to circumvent this limitation and increase the ZEILE field from 4 character using anything released to any other customer or  split the posting into multiple documents is the only way possible in this case ?

entry.title: descriptions of internal orders are not displayed in KOH3
entry.content: When running KOH3 for example internal order group IO_HSE, not all desprcitions are displayed. In change modus (KOH2) all descriptions are displayed

entry.title: How to reverse/cancel the reservation document in the subcontracting process in SAP
entry.content: How to reverse/cancel the reservation document created after the ASSIGN step in the subcontracting process in SAP or how to UNASSIGN it as UNASSIGN button is not giving any results.

entry.title: Über Report REA_RTRANS_UPLOAD keinen Datei Upload möglich
entry.content: Der Report REA_RTRANS_UPLOAD (aus Meldung 474197/2026) kann keine Datei hochgeladen werden. Es gibt kein Suche und auch bei manueller Eingabe.

entry.title: E stock is not shown in PI document via MI21 PDF output
entry.content: When we use MI21 to print out the PI document using PDF output， the item with E stock didn't display.

entry.title: E stock is not shown in PI document via MI21 PDF output
entry.content: When we use MI21 to print out the PI document using PDF output， the item with E stock didn't display.

entry.title: not able to issue material error showing batch stock not avialable
entry.content: when we create GRN batch was not active in article master , after few days batch activated on this article and there was stock in this item code without batch. we have created batch from MSC1N for this article . we are not able to issue stock due to stock is not against batch . please suggest solution how we can assign batch to this article stock . it is not allow to reverser GRN and adjustment for this article.

entry.title: Assign Doc. Type and Item Category to Value Chain - Adv. Intercompany Sales
entry.content:
We are activating US best practice activation in S5P system,

where we are getting error "Assign Doc. Type and Item Category to Value Chain - Adv. Intercompany Sales"

Please help us to resolve this issue
